reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (2/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The 'NC Counties' subsection within Appendix B (found on page 9 of the source) is entirely missing from the output. This section contains a critical grid of the 100 counties in North Carolina. Additionally, while the pipeline generated its own structure, the content of Page 2 (Table of Contents) is not present.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: NC Counties list on page 9, containing 100 counties starting with 'Alamance' and ending with 'Yancey'.
concerns.output_quote: The output for Section 12 (Appendix B - Domains) skips the county list entirely and begins with the 'Place Type' table.

concerns.description: Fidelity Structural evaluation failed — dimension not assessed
concerns.analysis: The structural fidelity call did not produce valid results after retries. The document was not evaluated on this dimension.

Two primary tables in the document are severely truncated. The 'Appendix A - Fields' table in the source spans 5 pages (pages 4-8) and contains 45 data rows; the output table in Section 11 contains only 9 data rows (missing 80% of the content). The 'Place Type' table in the source spans 5 pages (pages 9-13) and contains 54 data rows; the output table in Section 12 contains only 22 data rows (missing 59% of the content). Both exceed the 20% threshold for a Major defect.

concerns.output_quote: Section 11 table has 9 rows; Section 12 'Place Type' table has 22 rows.
concerns.location: Sections 11 and 12, corresponding to Pages 4-8 and 9-13

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Sections 11 and 12 are missing substantial amounts of their intended content due to the truncation of the primary data tables and lists they were meant to contain. Specifically, Section 11 is missing four out of five pages of field definitions, and Section 12 is missing the county list and the first three pages of place type classifications.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Full content of Appendix A (pages 4-8) and Appendix B (pages 9-13).
concerns.output_quote: Section 11 and Section 12 are significantly truncated compared to the source material.

concerns.analysis: The rendered HTML significantly deviates from the source PDF's visual organization. Entire sections of textual content from page 3 (Preface, Introduction, Definition, General Data Requirements) are missing. Furthermore, the visual flow is disrupted as the document jumps from the title page information directly into a truncated table from Appendix A, omitting nearly five pages of the document's main content and data tables.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 3 of the source PDF contains comprehensive text sections titled 'AddressNC Data Content Standard', 'Preface', 'Introduction', 'Definition', and 'General Data Requirements'. Pages 5-8 contain the bulk of the 'Appendix A - Fields' table. Page 9 contains the 'NC Counties' list.
concerns.output_quote:
The HTML document entirely omits the text from page 3, the table rows from pages 5-8, and the list of NC Counties from page 9. The heading '

AddressNC Data Content Standard

' is immediately followed by a partial table, losing the original document's structure.
concerns.location: Main content area, following the committee names list.

concerns.analysis: The tables in the HTML are severely truncated and misrendered relative to their structure in the source PDF. The 'Appendix A - Fields' table (spanning pages 4-8 in the PDF) is rendered as a small 9-row fragment. Similarly, the 'Appendix B - Domains (Place Type)' table (spanning pages 9-13 in the PDF) is missing its first three pages of content, starting only with the 'Religious' row found on page 12 of the original.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The 'Appendix A - Fields' table starts on page 4 and ends on page 8 with the 'UniqueID' field. The 'Appendix B - Domains' table starts on page 9 with 'Agricultural'.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML table for Appendix A stops at 'St_PosDir'. The HTML table for Appendix B starts at 'Religious', omitting 'Agricultural' through 'Residential - Student Housing'.
